title: The Power of Love
why_this_song: The Power of Love by Huey Lewis and the News (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "The power of love is a curious thing"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "First time you feel it, it might make you sad"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "You don't need money, don't take fame"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "More than a feeling that's the power of love"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "It's strong and it's sudden and it's cruel sometimes"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "power" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "power" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The power of love is a curious thing
But you'll be glad baby when you've found
And with a little help from above

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Change a hawk to a little white dove
They say that all in love is fair
You feel the power of love

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Huey Lewis and the News one question about "The Power of Love", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Huey Lewis and the News sobre "The Power of Love", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Power of Love" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Power of Love" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "The Power of Love" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "The Power of Love" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
